---
title: "Non-Exponential Tails of Free Atomic Spontaneous Emission"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<style>
main.content {
  max-width: min(980px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
  padding: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.4rem);
}

.paper-reader {
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(216, 208, 194, 0.9);
  background: #f7f4ee;
  box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(30, 28, 25, 0.12);
}

.paper-frame {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: min(1120px, calc(100vh - 9rem));
  min-height: 720px;
  border: 0;
  background: white;
}

.paper-fallback {
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--ink-muted);
}

@media (max-width: 700px) {
  main.content {
    max-width: calc(100vw - 0.75rem);
    padding: 0.6rem;
  }

  .paper-frame {
    min-height: 620px;
    height: calc(100vh - 7rem);
  }
}
</style>

<div class="paper-reader">
<iframe
  class="paper-frame"
  title="Non-Exponential Tails of Free Atomic Spontaneous Emission"
  src="papers/non-exponential-tails-free-atomic-spontaneous-emission.pdf#view=FitH">
</iframe>
</div>

<p class="paper-fallback">
If the embedded reader does not load, open the
<a href="papers/non-exponential-tails-free-atomic-spontaneous-emission.pdf">PDF version</a>.
</p>
